The conversation deck is housed in a luxury charcoal-grey slider box with gold-leaf foiling, and the cards are printed on thick, rounded-edge ivory cardstock for a high-end tactile experience.

71.title: Rose & Oud: The Unified Dream Ice Breaker
71.specialty: Yeh kit Ice Breaker series ka grand finale hai, jo specifically design kiya gaya hai "Long-term Planning" aur "Shared Future" ke liye. Iski sabse badi speciality iska "Visionary Deck" hai, jisme deep aur constructive sawal hain jaise ki "What is a dream we can build together?" Fragrance mein Rose aur Oud ka blend hai—Rose romance ko trigger karta hai aur Oud ek strong, grounding effect deta hai, jisse couples bina kisi hesitation ke apne bade sapno aur goals ke baare mein baat kar sakein. Yeh sirf ek date nahi, balki ek partnership building exercise hai.
71.usage: Set the mood by lighting the candle in a quiet space where you both feel comfortable dreaming big. Draw a card and take turns answering. Let the deep, luxurious aroma guide your thoughts toward the future you want to build together.
71.process: Candle ko ek luxury dark-amber glass vessel mein dala gaya hai jo candle ki flame ko ek deep golden glow deta hai. Wax mein premium Bulgarian Rose extracts aur smokey Oud oils ka use kiya gaya hai for a sophisticated aroma. Iska card box ek dual-tone metallic rose aur mauve finish mein aata hai, jisme rounded-corner cards hain jo rose-gold borders ke sath aate hain, taaki har card nikaalte waqt ek premium "gift" jaisa feel aaye.

The speciality lies in the Aroma-Harmony technology—the "Mild Rose" fragrance is engineered to be exceptionally light and non-intrusive. Unlike standard candles, it complements the natural aroma of your food, enhancing the dining experience rather than competing with it. 72.usage: Arrange the pillar candle as the central focus of your table and place the two taper candles on either side to create a classic "Golden Triangle" of light. Light the wicks 15 minutes before the meal is served to allow the subtle floral notes to settle and blend perfectly with the savory aromas of your dinner.

The entire set is housed in a bespoke, chocolate-brown "Meltix" signature box featuring intricate gold filigree embossing.

73.specialty: This kit is designed for the couple that treats every home-cooked meal like a culinary event. The speciality of this set is its neutralizing scent profile—the wax is infused with very light, crisp notes of white tea and ginger, specifically chosen to cleanse the palate and clear the air of cooking smells like garlic or oils without clashing with your food. It provides the perfect "Golden Hour" lighting for your table, making the presentation of your dishes look as good as they taste. It's the ultimate gift for a partner who loves to host "Dine In" dates, turning your kitchen table into a sophisticated bistro.

Light all three just as you begin plating the food to signal the start of a focused, intentional meal where the conversation and the flavors are the stars of the show.

74.title: White Musk: The Dine-In Romance Kit
74.specialty: This kit is for the partner who loves a "sensory-rich" dining experience that goes beyond just the food. The speciality here is the Botanical-Infusion pillar and the separate White Musk Essence vial. The fragrance is designed with a "Clean Base" profile—it doesn't fight against the aroma of your food. Instead, the soft white musk creates a luxurious atmosphere that feels like a private fine-dining room. It makes the date interactive by allowing you to control the scent intensity throughout the meal, ensuring the atmosphere is as curated as the menu.
74.usage: Arrange the petal-embedded pillar as your main center-piece and light the two taper candles to add height and a warm, flattering glow to the table. For an extra sensory boost between courses, uncork the "White Musk Essence" vial to refresh the air and transition the mood from dining to deep conversation.

The two cream-colored taper candles are designed to be dripless and smokeless to keep your table setting pristine. The entire kit is presented in a boutique-quality taupe gift box with embossed copper branding.

75.title: Sandalwood Infusion: The Earthy Dine-In Kit
75.specialty: This kit is designed for couples who enjoy bold, rich flavors and deep, grounding conversations. The speciality of the Sandalwood Infusion is its warm, woody aroma that acts as a perfect backdrop for a hearty meal. Unlike floral scents that can clash with savory dishes, sandalwood complements the "umami" notes of a dinner—making it ideal for nights involving red wine, grilled specialties, or rich pastas. It creates a sophisticated, "fine-dining" atmosphere that makes staying at home feel like a luxury getaway, helping partners focus entirely on the food and each other.
75.usage: Arrange the large, textured pillar candle in the center of your table to act as the "heart" of the meal. Place the two slim taper candles in gold holders on either side to add elegant, flickering height. Light the set 10 minutes before sitting down; the resulting "Golden Triangle" of light is specifically designed to cast a flattering, romantic glow across the table while the scent subtly preps the senses for a gourmet experience.
75.process: This premium trio features one hand-cast pillar candle with a unique "stone-texture" finish and two elegant, dripless taper candles. All are crafted from a 100% natural soy wax blend for a clean, non-toxic burn that won't interfere with the taste of your food. The pillar is finished with a minimalist gold "Meltix" band. 77.specialty: This kit is designed for the ultimate "stay-at-home" date. When the evening is over, use the copper snuffer to extinguish the flames; this prevents unwanted smoke from interfering with the sweet lingering aroma and keeps the wax surface pristine for your next viewing.

Jab aap "Vanilla & Caramel Popcorn" ki mithaas aur "Dark Chocolate & Spice" ki depth ko ek saath jalate hain, toh ghar ka mahol bilkul ek high-end cinema lobby jaisa ho jata hai. Yeh un couples ke liye perfect hai jo bahar jaane ke bajaye ghar pe movie dekhna pasand karte hain, kyunki yeh unki movie night ko ek immersive sensory experience mein badal deta hai.

79.specialty: This kit is for the ultimate binge-watching session where one scent just isn’t enough. The speciality of this trio is the "Scent Transition" experience. Use the included copper snuffer to "edit" your room's aroma without the smell of smoke interrupting the movie.
